RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0004 Page 2 of 3 Statement of Account — continued Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 23/10/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - 864 9,706 20/02/2025 UTILITY BILL - 1,872 11,578 06/11/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 11,578 08/01/2025 UTILITY BILL 163 1,634 13,049 09/05/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 885 1,794 13,958 11/01/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - - 13,958 01/01/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 808 2,083 15,233 09/01/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - 1,498 16,731 22/10/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 16,731 16/11/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 470 854 17,115 06/03/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 353 - 16,762 11/02/2025 UTILITY BILL 107 1,711 18,366 23/10/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - 2,293 20,659 22/04/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - 1,435 22,094 16/05/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 754 1,238 22,578 09/03/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 528 - 22,050 28/11/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 22,050 14/11/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 444 - 21,606
